text:
State Changed
From-To: open->feedback

Please send me a diff based on the _last_ version of the port. You 
patched port fails in at least 3 spectacular ways because of wrong 
dependencies. Also doesn't it need to RUN_DEPEND on clamav (like it is 
for clamav-devel)> Why did you change the LIB_DEPENDS logic?
